engine.ladder_reasoning: A photographer whose galleries/portfolio across communions, weddings, boudoir, newborn ARE the proof; the visitor browses the work to decide. Sells creative service, but the imagery — not credentials — is the decision driver.

goal.one_action: browse portfolio then contact the studio to book a session (or buy prints/albums in the WooCommerce shop)

structure.archetype_note: Portfolio-led photographer site with an added WooCommerce storefront (cart/checkout for prints, albums, sessions) — a hybrid gallery + e-commerce shop, not a single-conversion page.

mapped.observed_as: top nav with dropdowns (Home, Sesiones, Reportajes, Business, Nosotros, Tienda, Contacta)
Creamos los mejores recuerdos... + Descubre CTA
photo carousel across categories (Pregnancy, Boudoir, Wedding)
Sobre mí — Baltasar Mendoza bio, 20+ years, Canarian heritage
Tienda product category grid with price ranges (€99–€1,490)
aggregate ratings table Google 4.8, Bodas.net 4.9, Facebook 4.6
4 named customer quotes (Juan Francisco, Virginia, Saray, Laura)
contact info, hours, social links, visit counter

unmapped.observed: Tienda product category grid + individual priced products with cart/checkout
unmapped.why_no_fit: Full WooCommerce storefront (browsable priced catalog + cart) exceeds a static pricing/packages section — it is a transacting shop

proposed_new.name: storefront-checkout
proposed_new.evidence: WooCommerce tienda sells one-time goods (prints, albums, sessions) with prices €99–€1,490, product category grid, and cart_or_checkout=true

confidence.why: fetch_quality=full; clear multi-page structure, explicit CTAs, forms, commerce and proof all captured

gap_findings: Hybrid photographer-portfolio + WooCommerce storefront: engine 'work' captures the gallery-as-proof spine but not the on-site cart/checkout that makes this NOT a single-conversion site — 'storefront-checkout' capability needed to express the transacting shop layered atop the portfolio.
